provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Fertilizer (Appointment of Inspectors) Notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Appointment of inspectors
provisions.content: The whose name are specified in the Schedule to this Notice are appointed as inspectors for the purpose of exercising the powers in accordance with the provisions of the Fertilizers Act. [ Cap. 378 ]

provisions.title: Validity of appointment
provisions.content: The appointment of the inspectors in the Schedule shall be valid for as long as they remain in the public services or unless otherwise determined by Minister.
